lang.label: Language
hero.title: A family story
hero.lead: We produce premium quality olive oil, obtained exclusively from olives sourced from our own land.
hero.imgAlt: Olive oil in a glass bottle
features.title: Why choose us
features.lead: Control from tree to bottle, transparent origin and selected varieties.
features.card1.title: Cold pressing
features.card1.body: Extraction remains below 27°C to preserve antioxidants and aroma.
features.card2.title: Seasonal micro-batches
features.card2.body: Each batch has a unique profile and a traceability number.
features.card3.title: Premium bottle
features.card3.body: Dark glass protects from light and the pourer controls dosage.
approach.title: Olive selection from the first harvest.
approach.lead: We harvest by hand and mill immediately to prevent oxidation. Each variety is tasted by olive oil sommeliers.
collection.title: Our production
collection.lead: Three different products to meet every need: from everyday bottles, to olives in brine, to select black olives.
collection.item1.title: Olive oil
collection.item1.body: Extra virgin olive oil obtained from varieties typical of the Enna inland area: Moresca, Biancolilla, Nocellara Etnea.
collection.item2.title: Green olives
collection.item2.body: Green olives, Verdese variety, are excellent for preservation in brine.
collection.item3.title: Black olives
collection.item3.body: Black olives are manually selected for size and color uniformity.
cta.title: Need a tasting for a restaurant or shop?
cta.body: We curate the line and organize a tasting.
aboutHero.title: Rocca di Mietere Farm
aboutHero.lead: In the heart of Sicily, between golden hills and centuries-old olive groves, a story is born made of passion, sacrifice and tradition. The family business has its roots about 50 years ago, when grandfather Peppino, with hands marked by work and a look full of determination, decided to dedicate his life to the cultivation of olives and the production of Extra Virgin Olive Oil. At first it was little more than a dream, cultivated with love and patience on a few hectares of land. Over the years, thanks to his dedication, the company has grown, but kept intact its original values. Today, his children and grandchildren carry on that legacy with pride, combining traditional techniques with modern innovations. Every bottle contains the genuine flavor of the territory and a family story made of commitment, quality and love for the land.
packagingHero.title: Premium packaging for an extraordinary experience
packagingHero.lead: Every detail of our packaging is designed to protect and enhance our oil. From dark glass to elegant packaging, we offer quality solutions for every need.
about.features.title: Why choose us
about.features.card1.title: Our olive groves
about.features.card2.title: Varieties
about.features.card2.body: Moresca, Biancolilla, Nocellara Etnea, typical of the province of Enna
about.features.card3.title: Cultivated area
about.features.card3.body: 9 hectares of land, of which 5 with centuries-old trees
about.features.card4.title: Sustainable practices
about.features.card4.body: We implement eco-friendly methods to minimize environmental impact.
philosophy.title: Artisanal philosophy
philosophy.body: We do not pursue mass production. We create limited batches where we know the harvest and the aromatic profile. Each batch has a certificate of origin and a transparent story.
timeline.title: Our story
timeline.lead: From foundation in the 1970s to our current collection, here are the key moments of our journey.
timeline.item1.title: The origins
timeline.item1.body: Grandfather Peppino buys the first lands in the Rocca di Mietere district.
timeline.item2.title: The company
timeline.item2.body: Rocca di Mietere agricultural company is founded.
timeline.item3.title: Organic
timeline.item3.body: After a rigorous transition, we obtain organic certification and launch the Nonno's Oil brand.
timeline.item4.title: Expansion
timeline.item4.body: Purchase of land in the adjacent Votagrotta district.
values.title: Our values
values.item1: Respect for traditions and those who cultivate olives.
values.item4: Educational mission to teach proper tasting.
productsHero.title: Our production
productsHero.lead: Three different products to meet every need: from everyday bottles, to olives in brine, to select black olives.
products.item1.title: Extra virgin olive oil
products.item1.li1: Varieties typical of the Enna inland area: Moresca, Biancolilla, Nocellara Etnea.
products.item1.li2: Bottles and Tin-coated steel cans available.
products.item1.button: View our packaging: Bottles and cans
products.item1.imgAlt: Extra virgin olive oil in bottle
products.item2.title: Green olives
products.item2.body: Excellent for the production of table olives, thanks to firm flesh and delicate flavor.
products.item2.li1: Verdese variety, is a Sicilian native variety.
products.item3.title: Black olives
products.item3.body: Manually selected for size and color uniformity. Preserved under dry salt, they maintain firm flesh and sweet flavor typical of complete ripeness
products.item3.li1: Varieties typical of the Enna inland area: Moresca, Biancolilla, Nocellara Etnea.
packaging.item1.title: Bottles
packaging.item1.body: The oil is available in green-colored glass bottles to best protect its organoleptic characteristics and preserve its quality.
packaging.item1.imgAlt: Bottle of extra virgin olive oil
packaging.item2.title: Cans
packaging.item2.body: The oil is alternatively available in tin-coated steel cans, which guarantee protection from chemical alterations.
packaging.item2.imgAlt: Cans of extra virgin olive oil
formats.title: How we work
formats.body: We collaborate with retail, HoReCa and corporate gifts. We select volumes and can customize the label.
contactsHero.title: Write to us: we pair the oil and organize a tasting.
contactsHero.lead: Fill out the form or contact us by phone. We respond within one business day.
contactsInfo.title: Our contacts
contactsForm.consentText: I consent to the processing of my personal data to be contacted, as indicated in the privacy policy
visit.title: Visit the farm
visit.body: We have set up a space for intimate tastings. Book a visit and we will guide you through every phase of oil selection.
cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, remember your preferences and analyze site usage. You can choose to accept all, reject all, or only essential cookies.
